question.string: After whom is the Riemannian geometry named?
Which animal participated in a military operation with the Australian Defence Force?
among the characters in the witcher, who has two unmarried partners, Yennefer of Vengerberg and Triss Merigold?
among the founders of tencent company, who has been member of national people’s congress?
among the other representative work of the author of hunter x hunter, which one is talking about middle school student?
On which stock exchanges are Siemens AG shares traded?
Apart from the book series the witcher, name all of the author’s notable work.
are brooke raboutou and colin duffy from same state of the usa?

query.sparql:
SELECT ?result
WHERE {
  wd:Q2926117 wdt:P19 ?brookeBirth .
  wd:Q87192979 wdt:P19 ?colinBirth .
  ?brookeBirth wdt:P131* ?brookeState .
  ?colinBirth wdt:P131* ?colinState .
  FILTER(?brookeState = ?colinState) .
  FILTER(wdt:P131* wd:Q30) .
  BIND("Yes" AS ?result)
}

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?medal ?event WHERE {
  wd:Q128443 wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
  wd:Q128443 wdt:P2416 ?sport .
  wd:Q181278 wdt:P31 wd:Q186468 .
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q186408 .
  ?event wdt:P361 wd:Q181278 .
  wd:Q128443 wdt:P2522 ?medal .
  ?medal wdt:P361 ?event .
  FILTER (?event = wd:Q181278) .
}

question.string: Did Rawson Marshall Thurber, the director of Red Notice also direct Titanic?
Did Venice at any point belong to the Austrian Empire?
Were at least two of the founders of tencent educated at the same university?
Do all of batman’s partner speak english as native language?
How many spouses do head of states have on average?
Was there at least one Formula 1 event on the AVUS?
Find all Turkish verbs ending with “uş” with their lemma.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?verb ?lemma
WHERE {
  ?verb wdt:P31 wd:Q17524420 .
  ?verb wdt:P105 ?lemma .
  FILTER(REGEX(STR(?lemma), "uş$"))
}

question.string: From which country are the beagles originally from?
From which country came the 2nd most winners of the Emmy Award ?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?country (COUNT(?winner) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?winner wdt:P166 wd:Q190156 ;
        wdt:P27 ?country .
}
GROUP BY ?country
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
LIMIT 2
OFFSET 1

SELECT ?year ?lifeExpectancy

  ?iran wdt:P298 wd:Q794 .
  ?iran p:P2250 ?lifeExpectancyStatement .
  ?lifeExpectancyStatement ps:P2250 ?lifeExpectancy .
  ?lifeExpectancyStatement pq:P585 ?year .
  FILTER (?year > 1999)
}

question.string: How many countries have a democracy index higher than 7 and drive on the left side ?

}

question.string: How many French kings didn't die of natural causes?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?king) AS (?count))
WHERE {
  ?king wdt:P31 wd:Q842655 ;  # instance of monarch
    wdt:P279 wd:Q673050 ;  # subclass of French monarch
    wdt:P509 ?causeOfDeath .
  FILTER (?causeOfDeath != wd:Q3739104)  # not natural causes
}

question.string: How many people can play "Mensch ärgere dich nicht" at most?
How many people did Oscar Pistorius kill?
How many people died due to the Great Leap Forward according to the highest estimate?

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?item ?itemLabel (MAX(?number) AS ?max_number)
WHERE {
  ?item wdt:P31 wd:Q17524420.
  ?item wdt:P1714 ?number.
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en". }
}
GROUP BY ?item ?itemLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?max_number)
LIMIT 1

question.string: How many people have won the Nobel Prize in Literature since its inception?
How many people live in cities in the vicinity of the Nile ?
How many pitch classes are part of the chromatic scale?
how many plays has William Shakespeare written in the 16th century.

query.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>

SELECT ?work ?workLabel (COUNT(?work) AS ?count)
WHERE {
  ?work wdt:P50 wd:Q692 .
  ?work wdt:P577 ?date .
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) >= 1501 && YEAR(?date) <= 1600) .
  ?work wdt:P31 wd:Q429098 .
  SERVICE wikibase:label { bd:serviceParam wikibase:language "en" }
}
GROUP BY ?work ?workLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?count)
